name: Bowie MD, USA

rent.notes: Prince George's County — Belair, Mitchellville, Saddlebrook subdivisions. Mid-priced MD suburb; cheaper than Annapolis, more than Baltimore.

groceries.notes: Wegmans, Giant, Safeway, Harris Teeter. Similar to Annapolis pricing.

utilities.notes: BGE or Pepco electric + Washington Gas + WSSC or City water/sewer.

healthcare.notes: Medicare baseline. Doctors Community Medical Center (Luminis Health), UM Bowie Health Center. Johns Hopkins ~30 mi north.

transportation.notes: MARC (Maryland Area Regional Commuter) Penn Line at Bowie State to DC (~40 min). US Route 50 to Annapolis/DC. Capital Beltway access. Car-dependent outside rail corridor.

entertainment.notes: Allen Pond Park, Bowie Town Center, NASA Goddard Visitor Center nearby. Cable+1Gig typical.

miscellaneous.notes: HOA (homeowners association) common in Bowie subdivisions. ICC (Intercounty Connector toll road)/Route 200 and Bay Bridge tolls. Prince George's County (PG County) taxes relatively high.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile. Specialists at Johns Hopkins (Baltimore, ~30 mi) or Univ of MD Medical Center (DC/Baltimore).

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from MD + Prince George's County brackets.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Prince George's County, MD). Maryland Health Connection: CareFirst, Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: MD pension exclusion up to ~$39K for retirees 65+; SS fully exempt. Rates are combined MD state + Prince George's County piggyback (3.20% — highest county rate in MD).

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Maryland has no vehicle personal property tax — significant savings vs VA.

taxes.notes: MD tax benefits (Social Security exempt, pension exclusion, no vehicle tax) offset by Prince George's County (PG County) piggyback — highest county rate in MD (3.20%).

healthcare.notes: Luminis Health Doctors Community Medical Center, UM Bowie Health Center, Prince George's Hospital Center. Access to Johns Hopkins (Baltimore, ~30 mi) and Univ of MD Medical Center.

acaMarketplace.notes: Maryland Health Connection: CareFirst BlueCross, Kaiser Permanente, UnitedHealthcare. Prince George's County (PG County) rating area — similar to Anne Arundel.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Allen Pond Park, Bowie Baysox minor league baseball, NASA Goddard Visitor Center. Planned community (William Levitt 1960s). Good schools reputation. Strong historic African-American community.

pros.text: Maryland tax benefits: Social Security exempt, pension exclusion, no vehicle personal property tax

sources.title: Comptroller of Maryland — Pension Exclusion (Worksheet 13A) and SS exemption

pros.text: MARC (Maryland Area Regional Commuter) Penn Line commuter rail to DC (~40 min)

sources.title: Maryland Area Regional Commuter (MARC) Train — MTA Maryland Penn / Camden / Brunswick lines

pros: Between DC and Annapolis — central to regional amenities

pros.text: Johns Hopkins + Univ of MD specialist access within 30 min

pros: Planned community with established schools + parks

cons.text: Highest county piggyback rate in MD (3.20%) — combined state+county up to 8.95%
Prince George's County (PG County) has higher crime perception than Anne Arundel
Limited walkable downtown compared to Annapolis
Safety & crime: see cited reports for current figures by city and country
